name: pulsing-indicator
title: PulsingIndicator
description: A live status dot with a calm expanding-ring pulse and an optional label. The pulse is keyed off frame modulo so it loops seamlessly and renders deterministically — one steady ring, not a strobe.
pickWhen: a quiet "this is live" badge that should keep breathing — recording dot, status pill, online tag. Use `icon-pop` for one-shot static states.
